use_cases: Providing touch/click feedback on buttons following Material Design 3 specifications
Adding visual confirmation to interactive elements when pressed or tapped
Enhancing user experience with smooth ripple animations on pointer interactions
Creating consistent interaction feedback across web applications
Replacing default browser click effects with customizable Material Design ripples
ai_summary: A Material Design 3 compliant ripple effect component that provides visual feedback on user interactions. Implements physics-based animation with configurable color, opacity, and disabled states. Handles pointer events with proper state management including touch delay, holding, and waiting-for-click states. Supports both wrapper and inline modes for flexible integration into existing UI components.
